summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SEFAZ NF-e Editor Chrome Extension structure and code quality. All critical components validated successfully.

minor_issues.issue: chrome.runtime.onMessage not used (expected behavior - popup only sends messages)
minor_issues.impact: None - popup.js correctly uses chrome.tabs.sendMessage instead

minor_issues.issue: addEventListener pattern not explicitly found (uses message-based communication)
minor_issues.impact: None - content script correctly uses chrome.runtime.onMessage listener

passed_tests: Chrome Extension file structure validation (all 11 files present)
Manifest V3 compliance with correct permissions and host permissions
popup.html structure with all required elements and data-testid attributes
popup.js date formatting logic (DD/MM format) and Chrome API usage
content.js core functions: getProducts, updateDateRange, editProduct, getTotalValue
All PNG icons present in required resolutions (16, 32, 48, 128)
popup.css dark theme implementation with CSS variables
